title: Personal Site
tagline: A living portfolio for my work, fitness, travel, and interests
summary: I designed and built this Next.js site as both a portfolio and a home for projects that do not fit in a static resume. It combines written case studies with live fitness data, travel maps, music, and small signals from the things I am doing now.
outcome: Shipped one evolving site that connects professional work with live, privacy-conscious personal data.
